notes: Captures the horizontal multi-squid layout with eye placement on the right, but reduces four specimens to three and replaces articulated arms/fins with scribbled dashes.
specific_issues: only 3 squid silhouettes rendered vs 4 in the photo
arms and tentacles collapsed into scribbled dashes rather than discrete articulated arms with suckers
lateral fins not clearly defined as a separate contour from the mantle
noisy short-dash photo-trace clutter scattered across mantle interiors
stippling is too sparse and not concentrated in the chromatophore fields visible in the photo
leftmost specimen of the 4-squid arrangement is missing
mantle tips and head-mantle junction lack the clean continuous outline of FAO plates
